title: Multi-arch github-action workflow unification
body:
This is a port from the podman and buildah repository workflows.
It's purpose is to build and push multi-arch images containing the
latest upstream, testing, and stable versions of skopeo.  It fully
replaces the last remaining use of Travis in this repo, for
substantially the same purpose.

In a future commit, I intend to de-duplicate this workflow from
podman and buildah, such that all three share a common set of details.
Until then, any changes will need to be manually duplicated across
all three repos.

Fixes: #1255

comments.body: ***Note:*** I have a working prototype of a more unified workflow (re: commit message).  However, development on it is slow and non-optimized.  Rather than force the community to live with broken Travis automation, I thought we'd just duplicate this workflow yet again, but hopefully temporarily.

@vrothberg PTAL
@cevich Are we building skopeo for the mac and windows?
@cevich I've one more testing question, might be a late night brain fart.  If you think so, perhaps we can chat for a min or three tomorrow?
Fixed as discussed, rebased, and force-pushed.
And of course the ci barfed without leaving a trace behind.  I've hit restart.

LGTM
assuming happy tests.  However, logic has been changed pretty substantially since the first pass, so another review from @edsantiago , @rhatdan or @vrothberg would be appreciated.
